name: Sisense REST API
what_it_does: REST API for Sisense's embedded analytics platform enabling programmatic management of dashboards, widgets, data models, and users for embedding BI in applications.
use_cases: Embedding Sisense dashboards and widgets in SaaS applications
Programmatic dashboard and widget creation and management
Multi-tenant user and permission management at scale
Automated data model (ElastiCube) builds and refreshes
White-labeling analytics for OEM and ISV scenarios
not_for: Teams not building embedded analytics products
Simple internal BI without embedding requirements
best_when: You are a SaaS vendor embedding analytics in your product and need full programmatic control over multi-tenant dashboard management
avoid_when: You need a self-service BI tool for internal data teams without embedding requirements

auth.notes: API token generated per user from Sisense admin; passed as Bearer token. No OAuth or fine-grained scopes.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise licensing; pricing not publicly listed, requires sales contact
pricing.notes: API access included with platform license. Pricing varies significantly by deployment model (cloud vs on-premise).

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; varies by deployment

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HTTP error codes returned but error bodies inconsistent; some endpoints return HTML errors on misconfiguration
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency keys; duplicate POSTs create duplicate resources
known_agent_gotchas: ElastiCube build is async and can take minutes to hours; no webhook on completion
API token is user-scoped not application-scoped, limiting service account patterns
Rate limits undocumented and vary by deployment size
Some v0.9 and v1.0 endpoints differ significantly; version must be managed carefully
On-premise vs cloud API behavior can diverge

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; API tokens are long-lived with no built-in rotation; no OAuth scopes limit blast radius on token compromise
